academicPlan.focus: SAS Core: Expos & Calc 135. Join Accounting Society.
Intro Financial (010:272) & Managerial (010:275). Aim for B or better.
Intermediate I & II. Recruiting peaks in September for Big 4.
Tax & Advanced. Finalize 120 vs 150 CPA Pathway.
